text:
was a of the 104th Training Corps who fought in the battle of Trost District.

Appearance

Ruth appeared to be a thin, petite woman. She wore the typical trainee uniform.

Story

Wall Sealing arc

In the aftermath of the battle of Trost District, Ruth is among the corpses to whom Annie Leonhart apologizes.

Trivia

Ruth was not given a name in the manga, but instead was first named in the spin-off visual novel Wall Sina, Goodbye.
